examples: We were headed for the mountains

meanings.definition: travel in front of; go in advance of others
examples: The procession was headed by John

meanings.definition: be the first or leading member of (a group) and excel
direct the course; determine the direction of travelling

examples: These rivers head from a mountain range in the Himalayas

meanings.definition: be in the front of or on top of
examples: The list was headed by the name of the president

meanings.definition: form a head or come or grow to a head
examples: The wheat headed early this year

meanings.definition: having a heading or course in a certain direction
having a head of a specified kind or anything that serves as a head; often used in combination
of leafy vegetables; having formed into a head
